name: Pawn1st
description_short: At 2619 W Glendale Ave in Phoenix, AZ, Pawn1st provides fast pawn loans and quality merchandise.
description_long:
Located at 2619 W Glendale Ave in Phoenix, AZ, Pawn1st is a standalone pawn shop in the West Glendale neighborhood. This Phoenix location operates Monday through Saturday, 9 AM to 7 PM, and is closed on Sundays. It's a convenient stop for Phoenix residents needing quick access to pawn services and loans.

At this Phoenix pawn shop, you can pawn items for quick cash, take out loans against jewelry and electronics, or browse quality merchandise at discounted prices. Call 602-242-1500 to discuss item valuations, loan terms, or get directions to the 2619 W Glendale location.

If you need quick cash, bring a valid ID and the item you want to pawn when you visit Pawn1st at 2619 W Glendale Ave in Phoenix, AZ. Most transactions can be completed the same day, and the team focuses on fair valuations.
pros: 3,300+ locations across 29 U.S. states, UK, and Latin America—high accessibility and convenience
No credit check required; non-recourse loans mean no debt collection if item is forfeited
Fast cash on the spot for items of value without lengthy application processes
Wide range of accepted collateral (jewelry, electronics, tools, instruments, appliances)
Layaway service available with 10% down payment for budget-constrained customers
Gold and precious metals buying service for immediate liquidity conversion
Publicly traded company (S&P MidCap 400, Russell 2000) providing corporate stability and transparency
cons: Loan amounts are inherently limited by collateral value and subject to subjective store valuations
Short repayment terms create pressure to refinance or lose pledged items permanently
Interest rates and fees not disclosed on website; typical pawn rates are significantly higher than traditional loans
No credit-building benefit—pawn loans do not report to credit bureaus, so they do not improve credit scores
Risk of item loss if unable to repay; collateral forfeiture is the enforcement mechanism rather than formal debt collection
best_for: Consumers with urgent cash needs and no access to traditional credit (unbanked/underbanked)
People with valuable items (jewelry, electronics, instruments) willing to temporarily pledge collateral
Individuals seeking layaway or payment plan options for retail purchases with limited upfront funds
Those needing to convert precious metals or valuables to immediate cash quickly
diagnosis: FirstCash is best for cash-constrained or unbanked consumers with valuable collateral who need immediate funds without credit checks or lengthy approval processes. The primary caveat is that pawn loans are expensive short-term borrowing with risk of collateral loss and no credit-building benefit—they should be used only for genuine emergencies, not regular financial management.
services: Pawn loans secured by personal property
Retail sales of merchandise and pawned goods
Gold, silver, and precious metals buying
Layaway services with 10% down payment option
Non-recourse lending (no personal debt obligation after forfeiture)
Store locator and inventory search online
Lease-to-own and retail finance payment solutions (through AFF subsidiary)
Over 15,000 active retail merchant partner locations for finance options
meta_description: Pawn1st at 2619 W Glendale Ave, Phoenix, AZ. Fast pawn loans and equipment purchases.
